S.FORM: = José Mário Vaz = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 12 jiyax 10 ka José Mário Vaz ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Guinea-bissau ta sayang o kiya ka José Mário Vaz, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 6 jiyax 23 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = José Mário Vaz = José Mário Vaz (Kari Budoya: José Mário Vaz, kngkawas 1957 idas 12 diyax 10-), Guinea Bissau seyjicya, mnsoto Guinea Bissau. Papak
S.PHON: = ɟos* m*ɾio *a* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka ɟos* m*ɾio *a* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan guinəa-bissau ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɟos* m*ɾio *a*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. = ɟos* m*ɾio *a* = ɟos* m*ɾio *a* (kaɾi budoja: ɟos* m*ɾio *a*, kŋkawas **** idas ** dijax **-), guinəa bissau səɟiʦja, mnsoto guinəa bissau. papak
S.FORM: = José Mário Vaz = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 12 jiyax 10 ka José Mário Vaz ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Guinea-bissau ta sayang o kiya ka José Mário Vaz, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 6 jiyax 23 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = José Mário Vaz = José Mário Vaz (Kari Budoya: José Mário Vaz, kngkawas 1957 idas 12 diyax 10-), Guinea Bissau seyjicya, mnsoto Guinea Bissau. Papak
